name: MacOS Agent
description: Local macOS helper engine for Switchbay. Open apps, run scripts, read/write clipboard, capture screenshots, send notifications, manage defaults, and inspect files in Finder — all with JSON output for agent consumption.

tools.name: status
tools.description: Verify the MacOS engine is available and ready.

tools.name: open_app
tools.description: Open an application, file, folder, or URL using the macOS 'open' command.

target.description: App name, file path, folder path, or URL to open.

tools.name: run_script
tools.description: Run a local shell or AppleScript snippet via /bin/zsh.

script.description: The shell or AppleScript command string to execute.

tools.name: defaults_get
tools.description: Read a macOS preference value from a defaults domain.

tools.name: defaults_set
tools.description: Write a macOS preference value to a defaults domain.

tools.name: notify
tools.description: Send a local macOS notification with a title and message.

tools.name: clipboard_get
tools.description: Read the current contents of the macOS clipboard.

tools.name: clipboard_set
tools.description: Write text to the macOS clipboard.

text.description: The text to write to the clipboard.

tools.name: screenshot
tools.description: Capture a screenshot and save it to a file path.

output.description: The output file path for the screenshot (e.g. '/tmp/shot.png').
